name: branding-pitch
description: Pitch a brand end-to-end — analyze its visual DNA, generate an AI photography + video campaign (~6 images + 2 videos) with proper reference-image + still-first-then-animate consistency patterns, build a polished editorial landing page, served locally. Slash command is /pitch. Knows the full 7-script Krea.ai toolkit (generate_image, generate_video, enhance_image, train_style, list_models, pipeline, get_job) and runs list_models.py for live model discovery. Composes Krea.ai with Anthropic's frontend-design plugin and the impeccable typeset/polish/critique skills. Complements claude.ai/design for users who want the full pipeline over visual editing.
